warhammer.prompt: Given the name and files of a Warhammer 40K miniature, suggest 5-10 concise tags that identify its faction, subfaction or chapter, unit type, battlefield role, and any notable equipment, powers, or traits. Tags should be accurate and lore-aligned. Return only the tags as a comma-separated list with no numbering or extra text.

dnd.prompt: Suggest five concise tags for this Dungeons & Dragons miniature. Return only the tags as a comma-separated list with no numbering or extra text.
